title: saxifraga adscendens subsp. oregonensis
intro: Saxifraga adscendens subsp. oregonensis, also known as Oregon saxifrage, is a plant species that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and treating wounds and skin conditions due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Saxifraga adscendens subsp. oregonensis are often dried and made into teas or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
